/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hydrogen.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hydrogen.dir/src/hydrogen.cpp.o -o hydrogen -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL
